title: Tự tin thi đỗ FE
content:
Sau vài dòng tin nhắn “hỏi han” của 1 bạn trong công ty, mình quyết định sẽ viết 1 bài blog theo dạng kiểu“LÀM THẾ NÀO TÔI ĐÃ … TRONG X NGÀY” chia sẻ kinh nghiệm bản thân của mình trong việc luyện thi chứng chỉ FE.Ngày 26/04/2020 sẽ tổ chức kỳ Sát hạch Mùa Xuân - FE, ai còn chưa rõ về chứng chỉ FE mà đọc bài của mình thì tham khảo thêm link sau đây 
1. FE là gì?FE là chứng chỉ đạt chuẩn cơ bản kỹ sư CNTT của Nhật Bản. Vì thế, đây là chứng chỉ quan trọng cho việc xin xin tư cách lưu trú khi các bạn muốn sang Nhật sinh sống và làm việc.Ngoài ra tại nhiều công ty outsource nói chung hay điển hình là Kaopiz, chứng chỉ FE đem lại khoản lương thưởng lên tới 1 triệu đồng mỗi tháng với các anh chị em dev. Do đó không thể phủ nhận tầm quan trọng của chứng chỉ này.
2. Kiến thức nền tảngKiến thức thi FE là một mảng kiến thức cơ bản, nhưng rất rộng. Nền tảng kiến thức cơ bản của mình là những gì học suốt 4 năm trên giảng đường đại học - Mình tạm đánh giá ở mức khá.
3. Quá trình luyện thiNgày 1-4: Tổng hợp kiến thức, tận dụng thế mạnh.Kiến thức tổng quát đc tóm tắt trong quyển sách này FE_VN_1.Quyển này sách này có khoảng 450 trang, nhưng mình sẽ chỉ đọc trọng tâm vào nhưng phần là thế mạnh của mình.Mình thống kê bảng dưới đây:



Chương
Nội dung
Kiến thức



1
Khoa học máy tính
Tốt


2
Các hệ thống máy tính
Không vấn đề


3
Phát triển hệ thống
Tạm tạm


4
Công nghệ mạng
Tạm tạm


5
Công nghệ cơ sở dữ liệu
Ổn áp


6
Bảo mật và chuẩn hóa
Cũng ổn


7
Tin học hóa và quản lý
Khó-bỏ qua


Như vậy mình sẽ tập chung ôn lại kiến thức chương 1,2,5,6, nhưng chương còn lại khó quá bỏ qua. Như vậy trong 4 ngày mình sẽ dành 2-4 tiếng để đọc và làm câu hỏi trong 4 chương  mình cho là chắc kiến thức.
Ngày 5-6: Ba ngày công phá đề thi FEBộ đề các năm đc itpec công khai trên trang chủ, mọi người có thể click vào đây để xem.
Lưu ý mọi người kỳ thi FE có 2 phần thi sáng và thi chiều, theo mình phần thi chiều dễ hơn sáng, thiên về tư duy logic hơn nên mình tập chung luyện đề thi buổi sáng.
Mình ôn luyện 5 đề (2 đề 2017, 2 đề 2018, 1 đề 2019), Mình làm câu nào thì sẽ tra đáp án luôn, câu nào mình không làm được thì sẽ search từ khóa trên google hay trong cuốn sách ôn luyện phía trên.Những kiến thức mà mình ko biết trong quá trình làm các câu hỏi trong dề sẽ đc note lại. Cứ như vậy khi làm 1 đề, 2 đề, 3 đề các kiến thức cơ bản sẽ được lặp lại. Cuối cùng mình làm thử 1 đề buổi sáng và kết quả được 40/80 câu, cũng tạm ổn.( Là 40 câu chắc chắn đúng, còn lại khoanh bừa thì không tính) 
Đề thi buổi chiều, mình dùng 2 tiếng làm 1 đề, kiến thức khá dễ, gồm kiến thức về mạng, bảo mật, cơ sở dữ liệu, lập trình C, Java. Phần thi buổi chiều có thể tạm coi là an tâm.
5. Kết quảSau 1 tuần ôn luyện mình đã đỗ chứng chỉ FE với số điểm như sau.

Phần thi buổi sáng: 665/1000
Phần thi buổi chiều: 695/1000

Tuy không cao nhưng đỗ là mình vui rồi.
6. Kinh nghiệm sau kì thi (MẸO)
Các kiến thức về thuật toán, logic đa phần sẽ lặp lại dưới dạng câu hỏi khác. Do đó, lúc luyện đề, học cách làm những câu liên quan đến tính toán.
80 câu xếp theo thứ tự dễ đến khó, nên làm theo thứ tự từ 1-80. Đa phần các câu mình chăc đúng nằm ở 40 câu đầu của đề thi.
Không nên đọc mỗi đề tiếng Việt, một số câu về khái niệm đọc đề tiếng Anh sẽ có đáp án gợi ý ngay trong đề bài.
Phần thi buổi chiều, có kiến thức cơ bản về SQL, Java hoặc C, kiến thực về mạng là nắm chắc 40-50% số điểm rồi.
Câu nào về khái niệm mà ko rõ đáp án cứ khoanh câu dài nhất, trường hợp 2 câu dài nhất, thì khoanh đáp án ngắn hơn 1 tí.
Ngoài ra nên tìm đồng bọn trước kì thi để có thêm sự tự tin nhé!

7. Một số tài liệu và chia sẻ có thể tham khảo thêm.
Tài liệu: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1E6TX-rw_GfTBBa5lRgnSPoautSGlCLeI
Tự review: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bwLE5qbXikghgo3-pIXi07t8GaKH4wzs3yh9eWrm2Ik/edit?fbclid=IwAR3LXLUOl3UNGdgfDl_9xqDLAREpgtg5Or9s2B0_sWXiGykFiQeNrN56UcU#gid=0
Group FE và những người bạn: https://www.facebook.com/groups/1972535516344845/

title: Từ vựng mỗi ngày (Day 7)
content:
Vocabulary


Japanese
Furigana
English
English IPA
Vietnamese
English Example
Japanese Example



統合された
とうごうされた
unified
junɪfaɪd
thống nhất
The company announced a unified platform for all its products.
会社はすべての製品に対して統合されたプラットフォームを発表しました。


アイドル
あいどる
idle
aɪdl
thôi thúc, lười biếng
She spent the afternoon in idle gossip with friends.
彼女は友達と暇つぶしにおしゃべりをして過ごした。


逆行性の
ぎゃっこうせいの
retroactive
retrəʊˈæktɪv
có hiệu lực ngược lại
The new law is not retroactive and will not affect past convictions.
新しい法律は逆行性ではなく、過去の有罪判決に影響を与えません。


合成の
ごうせいの
synthetic
sɪnˈθetɪk
tổng hợp
The chemist developed a synthetic version of the compound.
化学者はその化合物の合成バージョンを開発しました。


遠隔測定
えんかくそくてい
telemetry
tɛləˈmɛtri
đo từ xa
The spacecraft sent telemetry data back to Earth.
宇宙船は地球に遠隔測定データを送信しました。


保持
ほじ
retention
rɪˈtɛnʃən
sự giữ lại
The company had a high rate of employee retention.
その会社は従業員の定着率が高かった。


English sentenceAfter the company’s merger, a unified system was implemented for the telemetry data of their synthetic materials. The retroactive analysis of this data allowed for the identification of idle machinery which was then activated and monitored using the same telemetry system. The retention of this data allowed for predictive maintenance to be performed remotely, preventing downtime and improving efficiency. The implementation of this system has been instrumental in the company’s success, allowing them to maintain their position as a leader in the industry.
Japanese sentence先日、統合された遠隔測定システムの導入により、アイドルグループのライブ会場で逆行性の振動が検知されました。この問題は、合成の音響テクノロジーを使用して解決され、今後のライブにおいても快適な環境を保持できるようになりました。

title: Từ vựng mỗi ngày (Day 5)
content:
Japanese
Furigana
English
English IPA
Vietnamese
English Example
Japanese Example



調査する
ちょうさする
Investigate
ɪnˈvɛstəˌɡeɪt
điều tra
We need to investigate the cause of the problem.
問題の原因を調査する必要があります。


並行性
へいこうせい
Concurrency
kənˈkʌrənsi
đồng thời
The software supports concurrency for multiple users.
そのソフトウェアは、複数のユーザーの並行処理をサポートしています。


呼び出し
よびだし
Invocation
ɪnvəˈkeɪʃən
sự triệu hồi
The function requires the invocation of two parameters.
その関数には2つのパラメーターの呼び出しが必要です。


停止
とうし
Outage
ˈaʊtɪdʒ
sự gián đoạn
The website is experiencing an outage and is currently unavailable.
ウェブサイトが停止しており、現在利用できません。


断続的に
だんぞくてきに
Intermittently
ˌɪntərˈmɪtəntli
gián đoạn, lặp đi lặp lại
The issue seems to occur intermittently, making it difficult to reproduce.
問題は断続的に発生するようで、再現が困難です。


基準
きじゅん
Basis
ˈbeɪsɪs
cơ sở
The decision was made on the basis of available data.
決定は、利用可能なデータを基にして行われました。


超える
こえる
Exceeds
ɪkˈsids
vượt quá
The total cost exceeds our budget.
総費用が予算を超えています。


期待する
きたいする
Expect
ɪkˈspɛkt
mong đợi
We expect the new product to be released next month.
私たちは、新しい製品が来月発売されることを期待しています。


不正検出
ふせいけんしゅつ
Fraud detection
frɔd dɪˈtɛkʃən
phát hiện gian lận
The bank uses advanced fraud detection techniques to prevent fraudulent activities.
銀行は不正行為を防止するために、先進的な不正検出技術を使用しています。


履行
りこう
Fulfilment
fʊlˈfɪlmənt
sự thực hiện
The company’s fulfilment center handles shipping and delivery of orders.
その会社の履行センターは、注文の出荷や配送を担当しています。

title: Từ vựng mỗi ngày (Day 4)
content:
Japanese
English
English IPA
Vietnamese
Example



取り外す
remove; take apart
təˈkeɪ əˈpɑrt
tháo ra; tách ra
電話のバッテリーを取り外してください。(Please remove the battery from the phone.)


引き取る
pick up; take over; adopt
pɪk ʌp; teɪk ˈoʊvər; əˈdɑpt
đón; tiếp quản; nhận làm con nuôi
私たちは空港で彼を引き取りに行きました。(We went to pick him up at the airport.)


引き受ける
undertake; accept
ˌʌndərˈteɪk; əkˈsɛpt
đảm nhận; chấp nhận
彼はそのプロジェクトを引き受けるつもりだ。(He intends to undertake the project.)


取り返す
regain; retrieve
rɪˈɡeɪn; rɪˈtriːv
lấy lại; giành lại
彼女は彼女の携帯を取り返すことができた。(She was able to retrieve her phone.)


取り掛かる
start; begin
ˈstɑrt; bɪˈɡɪn
bắt đầu
明日からプロジェクトに取り掛かります。(I’ll start working on the project from tomorrow.)


もたれかかる
lean against; rely on
liːn əˈɡɛnst; rɪˈlaɪ ɑn
tựa vào; dựa vào
彼女は壁にもたれかかっていた。(She was leaning against the wall.)


見返す
look back; review
lʊk bæk; rɪˈvjuː
nhìn lại; xem lại
今日の出来事を見返してみましょう。(Let’s look back at what happened today.)


仰ぐ
To look up to; To respect
əˈɡoʊ
Ngưỡng mộ; Tôn kính
彼女は彼を仰いでいた。 (She looked up to him.)


年賀状
New Year’s greeting card
ˈnjuː ˌjɪrz ˈɡritɪŋ kɑrd
Thiệp chúc Tết
日本では年賀状を送るのが習慣です。 (Sending New Year’s greeting cards is a tradition in Japan.)


奉仕
Service; Volunteer work
ˈsɜːrvɪs; ˌvɑːlənˈtɪr wɜːrk
Tình nguyện; Đóng góp
彼は地元のコミュニティで奉仕活動をしている。 (He is doing volunteer work in his local community.)


孝行
Filial piety; Being a good son/daughter
ˈfɪliəl ˈpaɪəti
Hiếu thảo
彼女は父親に対してとても孝行だ。 (She is very filial to her father.)


ろうはんしん
Old-fashioned; Traditional
ˈoʊld ˈfæʃənd; trəˈdɪʃənl
Cổ hủ; Truyền thống
彼の考え方は少しろうはんしんだ。 (His way of thinking is a little old-fashioned.)


きんしん
Serious; Earnest
ˈsɪriəs; ˈɜːrnɪst
Nghiêm túc; Chân thành
彼はきんしんに仕事に取り組んでいる。 (He is working earnestly on his job.)


匿名
Anonymous
əˈnɑːnəməs
Ẩn danh
彼は匿名の手紙を受け取った。 (He received an anonymous letter.)


仰天
To be amazed; To be surprised
əˈmeɪzd; sərˈpraɪzd
Ngạc nhiên; Kinh ngạc
彼女の腕相撲の腕力には仰天した。 (I was amazed at her arm wrestling strength.)


急逝
Sudden death
ˈsʌdn dɛθ
Tử vong đột ngột
彼は急逝した。 (He passed away suddenly.)


対称
Symmetry; Balanced
ˈsɪmətri; ˈbælənst
Đối xứng; Cân bằng
この建物は美しい対称を持っている。 (This building has a beautiful symmetry.)


引っ掻く
scratch
skrætʃ
cào, cọt
猫が私の足を引っ掻いた。 (The cat scratched my leg.)


上向く
face up
feɪs ʌp
hướng lên, đối mặt
彼女は上を向いて微笑んだ。 (She faced up and smiled.)


思いも寄らない
unexpected
ənɪk’spɛktɪd
bất ngờ, không ngờ đến
彼が思いもよらず会場に現れた。(He appeared at the venue unexpectedly.)


咎める
blame
bleɪm
trách móc, chỉ trích
彼は私を無断欠勤で咎めた。(He blamed me for an unauthorized absence from work.)


備わる
equipped
ɪ’kwɪpt
trang bị, được trang bị
そのホテルには最新の設備が備わっています。(The hotel is equipped with the latest facilities.)


和らげる
alleviate
ə’livieɪt
làm dịu, giảm nhẹ
彼女は彼の不安を和らげるために話しかけた。(She talked to him to alleviate his anxiety.)


こだわる
insist
ɪn’sɪst
khăng khăng, nhấn mạnh
彼女は品質にこだわる。(She insists on quality.)


つかさどる
oversee
ˌoʊvər’si
giám sát, quản lý
彼はそのプロジェクトをつかさどっている。(He is overseeing the project.)


打ち切る
cancel
ˈkænsəl
hủy bỏ, chấm dứt
映画の撮影は天候不良のために打ち切られた。(The filming of the movie was canceled due to bad weather.)


羽を休める
take a break
teɪk ə breɪk
nghỉ ngơi, thư giãn
彼女は長い旅の疲れをとるために羽を休めた。(She took a break to recover from the long journey.)

title: 『LPI−102』Exam Test 05
content:
1. SIMULATION Which command is used to set the hostname of the local system? (Specify ONLY the command without any path or parameters.)


Click to show answer
Correct Answer: hostname
Comment

hostnamectl is part of systemd, and provides a proper API for dealing with setting a server’s hostnames in a standardized way. So best answer should be hostname.




2. Which of the following lines is an example of a correct setting for the DISPLAY environment variable?
 
A. hostname:displayname

 
B. hostname:displaynumber

 
C. hostname/displayname

 
D. hostname/displaynumber

 
E. hostname





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Comment



3. Which of the following tools used for DNS debugging, reports not only the response from the name server but also details about the query?
 
A. dnsq

 
B. dig

 
C. hostname

 
D. dnslookup

 
E. zoneinfo





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Comment



4. Which of the following is a legacy program provided by CUPS for sending files to the printer queues on the command line?
 
A. lpd

 
B. lpp

 
C. lpq

 
D. lpr





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



5. FILL BLANK Which option in the /etc/ntp.conf file specifies an external NTP source to be queried for time information? (Specify only the option without any values or parameters.)
 A. server




Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Comment



6. Which file contains the date of the last change of a user’s password?
 
A. /etc/gshadow

 
B. /etc/passwd

 
C. /etc/pwdlog

 
D. /etc/shadow

 
E. /var/log/shadow





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



7. Which of the following parameters are used for journalctl to limit the time frame of the output? (Choose TWO correct answers.)
 
A. –from=

 
B. –since=

 
C. –until=

 
D. –upto=

 
E. –date=





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: BC
Comment



8. Given the following line from /etc/nsswitch.conf:hosts: files mdns4_minimal [NOTFOUND=return] dns mdns4By default, which file will be queried first for hostname lookups? (Specify the full name of the file, including path.)



Click to show answer
Correct Answer: Answer: /etc/hosts
Comment



9. What keyword is missing from this code sample of a shell script?____ i in *.txt; doecho $idone

 
A. for

 
B. loop

 
C. until

 
D. while





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Comment



10. Which file, when using Sendmail or a similar MTA system, will allow a user to redirect all their mail to another address and is configurable by the user themselves?
 
A. /etc/alias

 
B. ~/.alias

 
C. /etc/mail/forwarders

 
D. ~/.forward

 
E. ~/.vacation





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



11. What is true about the file /etc/localtime?
 
A. It is a plain text file containing a string such as Europe/Berlin

 
B. It is created and maintained by the NTP service based on the location of the system’s IP address.

 
C. It is a symlink to /sys/device/clock/ltime and always contains the current local time.

 
D. After changing this file, newtzconfig has to be run to make the changes effective.

 
E. It is either a symlink to or a copy of a timezone information file such as /usr/share/zoneinfo/Europe/Berlin.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: E
Comment



12. Given the following routing table:


 
A. It would be passed to the default router 192.168.178.1 on wlan0.

 
B. It would be directly transmitted on the device eth0.

 
C. It would be passed to the default router 255.255.255.0 on eth0.

 
D. It would be passed to the router 192.168.1.1 on eth0.

 
E. It would be directly transmitted on the device wlan0.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



13. Which character in the password field of /etc/passwd is used to indicate that the encrypted password is stored in /etc/shadow?
 
A. *

 
B. –

 
C. s

 
D. x





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



14. Which of the following options in the chrony configuration file define remote time sources? (Choose two.)
 
A. source

 
B. clock

 
C. remote

 
D. pool

 
E. server





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: DE
Comment



15. The correct crontab entry to execute the script chklog three times per month between 3 p.m. and 5 p.m.:
 
A. * 3,4,5 1 * * chklog

 
B. 3 3,4,5 1 * * chklog

 
C. 3 15,16,17 * * * chklog

 
D. 0 15,16,17 1 * * chklog

 
E. * 15,16,17 1 * * chklog





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



16. SIMULATION After configuring printing on a Linux server, the administrator sends a test file to one of the printers and it fails to print. What command can be used to display the status of the printer’s queue? (Specify ONLY the command without any path or parameters.)


Click to show answer
Correct Answer: lpq -or- /usr/bin/lpq -or- lpstat -or- /usr/bin/lpstat
Comment



17. What information related to a user account is modified using the chage command?
 
A. Default ownership for new files

 
B. Group membership

 
C. Set of commands available to the user

 
D. Password expiry information

 
E. Default permissions for new files





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Comment



18. SIMULATION Which command, available with all MTAs, is used to list the contents of the MTA’s mail queue? (Specify ONLY the command without any path or parameters.)


Click to show answer
Correct Answer: mailq -or- /usr/bin/mailq -or- sendmail -bp -or- /usr/sbin/sendmail -bp -or- /usr/lib/sendmail -bp -or- sendmail -or- /usr/sbin/sendmail – or- /usr/lib/sendmail
Comment



19. Which file contains a set of services and permitted hosts that will be allowed to connect to the server by going through a TCP Wrapper program such as tcpd?


Click to show answer
Correct Answer: Answer: /etc/hosts.allow
Comment



20. Why is the correct configuration of a system’s time zone important?
 
A. Because the timezone is included in checksum calculations and timezone changes invalidate existing checksums.

Correct.Man nmcliconnectivity [check]Get network connectivity state. The optional check argument tells NetworkManager to re-check the connectivity, else the most recent known connectivity state is displayed without re-checking. Possible states are:None: the host is not connected to any network.Portal: the host is behind a captive portal and cannot reach the full Internet.Limited: the host is connected to a network, but it has no access to the Internet.Full: the host is connected to a network and has full access to the Internet.Unknown: the connectivity status cannot be found out.6

Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Comment

C is correct.Man dig -t typeThis option indicates the resource record type to query, which can be any valid query type. If it is a resource record type supported in BIND 9, it can be given by the type mnemonic (such as NS or AAAA). The default query type is A, unless the -x option is supplied to indicate a reverse lookup. A zone transfer can be requested by specifying a type of AXFR. When an incremental zone transfer (IXFR) is required , set the type to ixfr=N. The incremental zone transfer contains all changes made to the zone since the serial number in the zone’s SOA record was N. All resource record types can be expressed as TYPEnn, where nn is the number of the type. If the resource record type is not supported in BIND 9, the result is displayed as described in RFC 3597.

To allow or deny access to specific users, crontab uses the files /etc/cron.allow and /etc/cron.deny. Based on the existence of /etc/cron.allow and /etc/cron.deny files, crontab decides whom to give access to cron in following order.If cron.allow exists – only the users listed in the file cron.allow will get an access to crontab.If cron.allow does not exist – all users except the users listed into cron.deny can use crontabIf neither of the file exists – only the root can use crontabIf a user is listed in both cron.allow and cron.deny – that user can use crontab.https://www.thegeekdiary.com/unix-linux-how-crontab-validates-the-access-based-on-the-cron-allow-and-cron-deny-files/Hope the extra info is helpfull for the next person 😉

if neither file exists then only root can create crontabs, making the answer A.There is no way to prevent root from using cron, so these files will only affect user access.The only way for a user to have a user-specific crontab is if root creates it for them with: crontab -u {user} -eor you can grant the user the ability to do it themselves by listing their username in the /etc/cron.allow file.This is how I see it, thinking from root’s perspective

centos has /etc/cron.deny empty file already created, so as long as it’s empty, any user can create cron jobs, if you delete this file, non-root users will not be able to do anything with cron..1

so answer is A for centos, although if /etc/cron.deny is missing, root still can use cron! silly question indeed..

Thank you so much for the comments. I had doubts.I thought the correct one was answer B, but I was surprised to see that question A is the correct one ..Marius’s answer has helped to understand why it is the right answer.Anyway it is a somewhat tricky question

Thanks bro

Answer A is wrong. This would by the behaviour of atd and is not the one of crond.Due Answer B is right.

Correct Answer: A+Dhttps://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man5/crontab.5.htmlA crontab file contains instructions for the cron(8) daemon inthe following simplified manner: “run this command at this timeon this date”. Each user can define their own crontab. Commandsdefined in any given crontab are executed under the user who ownsthat particular crontab. Uucp and News usually have their owncrontabs, eliminating the need for explicitly running su(1) aspart of a cron command.@hourly : Run once an hour, ie. “0 * * * *”.CAVEATS top crontab files have to be regular files or symlinks to regularfiles, they must not be executable or writable for anyone elsebut the owner. This requirement can be overridden by using the-p option on the crond command line. If inotify support is inuse, changes in the symlinked crontabs are not automaticallynoticed by the cron daemon. The cron daemon must receive aSIGHUP signal to reload the crontabs. This is a limitation ofthe inotify API. cron requires that each entry in a crontab end in a newlinecharacter. If the last entry in a crontab is missing a newline(i.e. terminated by EOF), cron will consider the crontab (atleast partially) broken. A warning will be written to syslog.1

title: 『AWS−DVA』Exam Test C02（Exam 1)
content:
1. A company uses Amazon DynamoDB for managing and tracking orders. The DynamoDB table is partitioned based on the order date. The company receives a huge increase in orders during a sales event, causing DynamoDB writes to throttle, and the consumed throughput is far below the provisioned throughput.According to AWS best practices, how can this issue be resolved with MINIMAL costs?
 
A. Create a new DynamoDB table for every order date.

 
B. Increase the read and write capacity units of the DynamoDB table.

 
C. Add a random number suffix to the partition key values.

 
D. Add a global secondary index to the DynamoDB table.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/7651-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-156/



2. A Development team currently supports an application that uses an in-memory store to save accumulated game results. Individual results are stored in a database. As part of migrating to AWS, the team needs to use automatic scaling. The team knows this will yield inconsistent results.Where should the team store these accumulated game results to BEST allow for consistent results without impacting performance?
 
A. Amazon S3

 
B. Amazon RDS

 
C. Amazon ElastiCache

 
D. Amazon Kinesis





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4356-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-151/



3. A Developer has written an Amazon Kinesis Data Streams application. As usage grows and traffic increases over time, the application is regularly receiving ProvisionedThroughputExceededException error messages.Which steps should the Developer take to resolve the error? (Choose two.)
 
A. Use Auto Scaling to scale the stream for better performance

 
B. Increase the delay between the GetRecords call and the PutRecords call

 
C. Increase the number of shards in the data stream

 
D. Specify a shard iterator using the ShardIterator parameter

 
E. Implement exponential backoff on the GetRecords call and the PutRecords call





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: CE
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28264-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-242/



4. A Developer is asked to implement a caching layer in front of Amazon RDS. Cached content is expensive to regenerate in case of service failure. Which implementation below would work while maintaining maximum uptime?
 
A. Implement Amazon ElastiCache Redis in Cluster Mode

 
B. Install Redis on an Amazon EC2 instance.

 
C. Implement Amazon ElastiCache Memcached.

 
D. Migrate the database to Amazon Redshift.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/5386-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-11/



5. A Developer is creating a mobile application with a limited budget. The solution requires a scalable service that will enable customers to sign up and authenticate into the mobile application while using the organization’s current SAML 2.0 identity provider.Which AWS service should be used to meet these requirements?
 
A. AWS Lambda

 
B. Amazon Cognito

 
C. AWS IAM

 
D. Amazon EC2





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/5484-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-77/



6. A company recently migrated its web, application and NoSQL database tiers to AWS. The company is using Auto Scaling to scale the web and application tiers.More than 95 percent of the Amazon DynamoDB requests are repeated readrequests.How can the DynamoDB NoSQL tier be scaled up to cache these repeated requests?
 
A. Amazon EMR

 
B. Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator

 
C. Amazon SQS

 
D. Amazon CloudFront





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10223-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-123/



7. A company wants to containerize an existing three-tier web application and deploy it to Amazon ECS Fargate. The application is using session data to keep track of user activities.Which approach would provide the BEST user experience?
 
A. Provision a Redis cluster in Amazon ElastiCache and save the session data in the cluster.

 
B. Create a session table in Amazon Redshift and save the session data in the database table.

 
C. Enable session stickiness in the existing Network Load Balancer and manage the session data in the container.

 
D. Use an Amazon S3 bucket as data store and save the session data in the bucket.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28460-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-267/



8. A website’s page load times are gradually increasing as more users access the system at the same time. Analysis indicates that a user profile is being loaded from a database in all the web pages being visited by each user and this is increasing the database load and the page load latency. To address this issue theDeveloper decides to cache the user profile data.Which caching strategy will address this situation MOST efficiently?
 
A. Create a new Amazon EC2 Instance and run a NoSQL database on it. Cache the profile data within this database using the write-through caching strategy.

 
B. Create an Amazon ElastiCache cluster to cache the user profile data. Use a cache-aside caching strategy.

 
C. Use a dedicated Amazon RDS instance for caching profile data. Use a write-through caching strategy.

 
D. Create an ElastiCache cluster to cache the user profile data. Use a write-through caching strategy.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4178-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-89/

15. An application running on an Amazon Linux EC2 instance needs to manage the AWS infrastructure.How can the EC2 instance be configured to make AWS API calls securely?

63. A company is migrating its on-premises database to Amazon RDS for MySQL. The company has read-heavy workloads, and wants to make sure it re-factors its code to achieve optimum read performance for its queries. How can this objective be met?
 
A. Add database retries to effectively use RDS with vertical scaling

Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4290-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-89/



64. A Developer must deploy a new AWS Lambda function using an AWS CloudFormation template.Which procedures will deploy a Lambda function? (Select TWO.)
 
A. Upload the code to an AWS CodeCommit repository, then add a reference to it in an AWS::Lambda::Function resource in the template.

 
B. Create an AWS::Lambda::Function resource in the template, then write the code directly inside the CloudFormation template.

 
C. Upload a .ZIP file containing the function code to Amazon S3, then add a reference to it in an AWS::Lambda::Function resource in the template.

 
D. Upload a .ZIP file to AWS CloudFormation containing the function code, then add a reference to it in an AWS::Lambda::Function resource in the template.

 
E. Upload the function code to a private Git repository, then add a reference to it in an AWS::Lambda::Function resource in the template.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: BC

65. An application is being developed to audit several AWS accounts. The application will run in Account A and must access AWS services in Accounts B and C.What is the MOST secure way to allow the application to call AWS services in each audited account?
 
A. Configure cross-account roles in each audited account. Write code in Account A that assumes those roles

C. Deploy an application in each audited account with its own role. Have Account A authenticate with the application

 
D. Create an IAM user with an access key in each audited account. Write code in Account A that uses those access keys

Correct Answer: A

title: 『AWS−DVA』Exam Test C02（Exam 2)
content:
1. A Development team wants to immediately build and deploy an application whenever there is a change to the source code.Which approaches could be used to trigger the deployment? (Choose two.)
 
A. Store the source code in an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure AWS CodePipeline to start whenever a file in the bucket changes.

 
B. Store the source code in an encrypted Amazon EBS volume. Configure AWS CodePipeline to start whenever a file in the volume changes.

 
C. Store the source code in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Configure AWS CodePipeline to start whenever a change is committed to the repository.

 
D. Store the source code in an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure AWS CodePipeline to start every 15 minutes.

 
E. Store the source code in an Amazon EC2 instance’s ephemeral storage. Configure the instance to start AWS CodePipeline whenever there are changes to the source code.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: AC
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28078-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-235/



2. A Software Engineer developed an AWS Lambda function in Node.js to do some CPU-intensive data processing. With the default settings, the Lambda function takes about 5 minutes to complete.Which approach should a Developer take to increase the speed of completion?
 
A. Instead of using Node.js, rewrite the Lambda function using Python.

 
B. Instead of packaging the libraries in the ZIP file with the function, move them to a Lambda layer and use the layer with the function.

 
C. Allocate the maximum available CPU units to the function.

 
D. Increase the available memory to the function.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D

3. A Developer is storing sensitive documents in Amazon S3 that will require encryption at rest. The encryption keys must be rotated annually, at least.What is the easiest way to achieve this?
 
A. Encrypt the data before sending it to Amazon S3

 
B. Import a custom key into AWS KMS with annual rotation enabled

 
C. Use AWS KMS with automatic key rotation

 
D. Export a key from AWS KMS to encrypt the data

Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/7033-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-205/



4. A developer is building an application using an Amazon API Gateway REST API backend by an AWS Lambda function that interacts with an Amazon DynamoDB table. During testing, the developer observes high latency when making requests to the API.How can the developer evaluate the end-to-end latency and identify performance bottlenecks?
 
A. Enable AWS CloudTrail logging and use the logs to map each latency and bottleneck.

 
B. Enable and configure AWS X-Ray tracing on API Gateway and the Lambda function. Use X-Ray to trace and analyze user requests.

B. AWS Direct Connect with AWS Lambda

 
C. Amazon Kinesis Data Streams with AWS Lambda

6. A Developer must re-implement the business logic for an order fulfilment system. The business logic has to make requests to multiple vendors to decide where to purchase an item. The whole process can take up to a week to complete.What is the MOST efficient and SIMPLEST way to implement a system that meets these requirements?

The Developer made the necessary changes in the application tested it, and found that the application is able to send the traces to AWS X-Ray. However, when the application is deployed to an EC2 instance, the traces are not available.Which of the following could create this situation? (Select two.)

8. You are inserting 1000 new items every second in a DynamoDB table. Once an hour these items are analyzed and then are no longer needed. You need to minimize provisioned throughput, storage, and API calls.Given these requirements, what is the most efficient way to manage these Items after the analysis?
 
A. Retain the items in a single table

10. A company’s fleet of Amazon EC2 instances receives data from millions of users through an API. The servers batch the data, add an object for each user, and upload the objects to an S3 bucket to ensure high access rates. The object attributes are Customer ID, Server ID, TS-Server (TimeStamp and Server ID), the size of the object, and a timestamp. A Developer wants to find all the objects for a given user collected during a specified time range.After creating an S3 object created event, how can the Developer achieve this requirement?

C. Execute an AWS Lambda function in response to the S3 object creation events that creates an Amazon DynamoDB record for every object with the Customer ID as the partition key and TS-Server as the sort key. Retrieve all therecords using the Customer ID and TS-Server attributes.

title: 『AWS−DVA』Exam Test C02（Exam 4)
content:
1. An application stores images in an S3 bucket. Amazon S3 event notifications are used to trigger a Lambda function that resizes the images. Processing each image takes less than a second.How will AWS Lambda handle the additional traffic?
 
A. Lambda will scale out to execute the requests concurrently.

 
B. Lambda will handle the requests sequentially in the order received.

 
C. Lambda will process multiple images in a single execution.

 
D. Lambda will add more compute to each execution to reduce processing time.

Correct Answer: A

2. A Developer executed a AWS CLI command and received the error shown below:What action should the Developer perform to make this error human-readable?


 
A. Make a call to AWS KMS to decode the message.

 
B. Use the AWS STS decode-authorization-message API to decode the message.

 
C. Use an open source decoding library to decode the message.

 
D. Use the AWS IAM decode-authorization-message API to decode this message.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B

3. A Developer accesses AWS CodeCommit over SSH. The SSH keys configured to access AWS CodeCommit are tied to a user with the following permissions:The Developer needs to create/delete branches.Which specific IAM permissions need to be added, based on the principle of least privilege?

4. A company has 25,000 employees and is growing. The company is creating an application that will be accessible to its employees only. A developer is using Amazon S3 to store images and Amazon RDS to store application data. The company requires that all employee information remain in the legacy Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) employee directory only and is not interested in mirroring any employee information on AWS.How can the developer provide authorized access for the employees who will be using this application so each employee can access their own application data only?
 
A. Use Amazon VPC and keep all resources inside the VPC, and use a VPC link for the S3 bucket with the bucket policy.

 
B. Use Amazon Cognito user pools, federate with the SAML provider, and use user pool groups with an IAM policy.

 
C. Use an Amazon Cognito identity pool, federate with the SAML provider, and use an IAM condition key with a value for the cognitoidentity. amazonaws.com:sub variable to grant access to the employees.

D. Enable server side encryption on the S3 bucket for data protection against the non-paying website visitors





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10570-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-24/



65. When a Simple Queue Service message triggers a task that takes 5 minutes to complete, which process below will result in successful processing of the message and remove it from the queue while minimizing the chances of duplicate processing?
 
A. Retrieve the message with an increased visibility timeout, process the message, delete the message from the queue

 
B. Retrieve the message with an increased visibility timeout, delete the message from the queue, process the message

 
C. Retrieve the message with increased DelaySeconds, process the message, delete the message from the queue

 
D. Retrieve the message with increased DelaySeconds, delete the message from the queue, process the message





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10569-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-23/

title: 『AWS−DVA』Exam Test C02（Exam 3)
content:
1. A Developer is storing sensitive data generated by an application in Amazon S3. The Developer wants to encrypt the data at rest. A company policy requires an audit trail of when the master key was used and by whom.Which encryption option will meet these requirements?
 
A. Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3)

 
B. Server-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS)

 
C. Server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C)

 
D. Server-side encryption with self-managed keys





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28801-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-217/



2. A Developer has been asked to make changes to the source code of an AWS Lambda function. The function is managed using an AWS CloudFormation template. The template is configured to load the source code from an Amazon S3 bucket. The Developer manually created a .ZIP file deployment package containing the changes and put the file into the correct location on Amazon S3. When the function is invoked, the code changes have not been applied.What step is required to update the function with the changes?
 
A. Delete the .ZIP file on S3, and re-upload by using a different object key name.

 
B. Update the CloudFormation stack with the correct values for the function code properties S3Bucket, S3Key, or S3ObjectVersion.

 
C. Ensure that the function source code is base64-encoded before uploading the deployment package to S3.

 
D. Modify the execution role of the Lambda function to allow S3 access permission to the deployment package .ZIP file.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4258-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-141/



3. A Developer has an application that can upload tens of thousands of objects per second to Amazon S3 in parallel within a single AWS account. As part of new requirements, data stored in S3 must use server side encryption with AWS KMS (SSE-KMS). After creating this change, performance of the application is slower.Which of the following is MOST likely the cause of the application latency?
 
A. Amazon S3 throttles the rate at which uploaded objects can be encrypted using Customer Master Keys.

 
B. The AWS KMS API calls limit is less than needed to achieve the desired performance.

 
C. The client encryption of the objects is using a poor algorithm.

 
D. KMS requires that an alias be used to create an independent display name that can be mapped to a CMK.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/3685-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-2018-topic-1-question/



4. You have written an application that uses the Elastic Load Balancing service to spread traffic to several web servers. Your users complain that they are sometimes forced to login again in the middle of using your application, after they have already logged in. This is not behavior you have designed.What is a possible solution to prevent this happening?
 
A. Use instance memory to save session state.

 
B. Use instance storage to save session state.

 
C. Use EBS to save session state

 
D. Use ElastiCache to save session state.

 
E. Use Glacier to save session slate.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10603-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-63/



5. A developer has written an AWS Lambda function using Java as the runtime environment. The developer wants to isolate a performance bottleneck in the code.Which steps should be taken to reveal the bottleneck?
 
A. Use the Amazon CloudWatch API to write timestamps to a custom CloudWatch metric. Use the CloudWatch console to analyze the resulting data.

 
B. Use the AWS X-Ray API to write trace data into X-Ray from strategic places within the code. Use the Amazon CloudWatch console to analyze the resulting data.

 
C. Use the AWS X-Ray API to write trace data into X-Ray from strategic places within the code. Use the X-Ray console to analyze the resulting data.

 
D. Use the Amazon CloudWatch API to write timestamps to a custom CloudWatch metric. Use the AWS X-Ray console to analyze the resulting data.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28997-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-191/



6. An application under development is required to store hundreds of video files. The data must be encrypted within the application prior to storage, with a unique key for each video file.How should the Developer code the application?
 
A. Use the KMS Encrypt API to encrypt the data. Store the encrypted data key and data.

 
B. Use a cryptography library to generate an encryption key for the application. Use the encryption key to encrypt the data. Store the encrypted data.

 
C. Use the KMS GenerateDataKey API to get a data key. Encrypt the data with the data key. Store the encrypted data key and data.

 
D. Upload the data to an S3 bucket using server side-encryption with an AWS KMS key.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/2634-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-2018-topic-1-question/



7. What is required to trace Lambda-based applications with AWS X-Ray?
 
A. Send logs from the Lambda application to an S3 bucket; trigger a Lambda function from the bucket to send data to AWS X-Ray.

 
B. Trigger a Lambda function from the application logs in Amazon CloudWatch to submit tracing data to AWS X-Ray.

 
C. Use an IAM execution role to give the Lambda function permissions and enable tracing.

 
D. Update and add AWS X-Ray daemon code to relevant parts of the Lambda function to set up the trace.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28458-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-282/



8. Which features can be used to restrict access to data in S3? (Choose two.)
 
A. Use S3 Virtual Hosting

 
B. Set an S3 Bucket policy.

 
C. Enable IAM Identity Federation.

 
D. Set an S3 ACL on the bucket or the object.

 
E. Create a CloudFront distribution for the bucket





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: BD
CommentNone



9. An ecommerce startup is preparing for an annual sales event. As the traffic to the company’s application increases, the development team wants to be notified when the Amazon EC2 instance’s CPU utilization exceeds 80%.Which solution will meet this requirement?
 
A. Create a custom Amazon CloudWatch alarm that sends a notification to an Amazon SNS topic when the CPU utilization exceeds 80%.

 
B. Create a custom AWS Cloud Trail alarm that sends a notification to an Amazon SNS topic when the CPU utilization exceeds 80%.

 
C. Create a cron job on the EC2 instance that executes the –describe-instance-information command on the host instance every 15 minutes and sends the results to an Amazon SNS topic.

 
D. Create an AWS Lambda function that queries the AWS CloudTrail logs for the CPUUtilization metric every 15 minutes and sends a notification to an Amazon SNS topic when the CPU utilization exceeds 80%.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28956-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-305/



10. When writing a Lambda function, what is the benefit of instantiating AWS clients outside the scope of the handler?
 
A. Legibility and stylistic convention

 
B. Taking advantage of connection re-use

 
C. Better error handling

 
D. Creating a new instance per invocation





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/5398-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-23/



11. A Developer uses AWS CodeDeploy to automate application deployment that connects to an external MySQL database. The Developer wants to securely access the encrypted secrets, such as API keys and database passwords.Which of the following solutions would involve the LEAST administrative effort?
 
A. Save the secrets in Amazon S3 with AWS KMS server-side encryption, and use a signed URL to access them by using the IAM role from Amazon EC2 instances.

 
B. Use the instance metadata to store the secrets and to programmatically access the secrets from EC2 instances.

 
C. Use the Amazon DynamoDB client-side encryption library to save the secrets in DynamoDB and to programmatically access the secrets from EC2 instances.

 
D. Use AWS SSM Parameter Store to store the secrets and to programmatically access them by using the IAM role from EC2 instances.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4167-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-70/



12. When uploading an object, what request header can be explicitly specified in a request to Amazon S3 to encrypt object data when saved on the server side?
 
A. x-amz-storage-class

 
B. Content-MD5

 
C. x-amz-security-token

 
D. x-amz-server-side-encryption





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
CommentNone



13. According to best practice, how should access keys be managed in AWS? (Choose two.)
 
A. Use the same access key in all applications for consistency.

 
B. Delete all access keys for the account root user.

 
C. Leave unused access keys in the account for tracking purposes.

 
D. Embed and encrypt access keys in code for continuous deployment.

 
E. Use Amazon IAM roles instead of access keys where possible.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: BE
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/5808-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-92/



14. You run an ad-supported photo sharing website using S3 to serve photos to visitors of your site. At some point you find out that other sites have been linking to the photos on your site, causing loss to your business.What is an effective method to mitigate this?
 
A. Store photos on an EBS volume of the web server

 
B. Remove public read access and use signed URLs with expiry dates.

 
C. Use CloudFront distributions for static content.

 
D. Block the IPs of the offending websites in Security Groups.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10604-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-64/



15. A Developer will be using the AWS CLI on a local development server to manage AWS services.What can be done to ensure that the CLI uses the Developer’s IAM permissions when making commands?
 
A. Specify the Developer’s IAM access key ID and secret access key as parameters for each CLI command.

 
B. Run the aws configure CLI command, and provide the Developer’s IAM access key ID and secret access key.

 
C. Specify the Developer’s IAM user name and password as parameters for each CLI command.

 
D. Use the Developer’s IAM role when making the CLI command.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/5486-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-80/



16. A company is building a compute-intensive application that will run on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application uses attached Amazon EBS disks for storing data. The application will process sensitive information and all the data must be encrypted.What should a Developer do to ensure the data is encrypted on disk without impacting performance?
 
A. Configure the Amazon EC2 instance fleet to use encrypted EBS volumes for storing data.

 
B. Add logic to write all data to an encrypted Amazon S3 bucket.

 
C. Add a custom encryption algorithm to the application that will encrypt and decrypt all data.

 
D. Create a new Amazon Machine Image (AMI) with an encrypted root volume and store the data to ephemeral disks.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28429-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-250/



17. An e-commerce web application that shares session state on-premises is being migrated to AWS. The application must be fault tolerant, natively highly scalable, and any service interruption should not affect the user experience.What is the best option to store the session state?
 
A. Store the session state in Amazon ElastiCache

 
B. Store the session state in Amazon CloudFront

 
C. Store the session state in Amazon S3

 
D. Enable session stickiness using elastic load balancers





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/8789-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-176/



18. A company caches session information for a web application in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company wants an automated way to delete old items from the table.What is the simplest way to do this?
 
A. Write a script that deletes old records; schedule the scripts as a cron job on an Amazon EC2 instance.

 
B. Add an attribute with the expiration time; enable the Time To Live feature based on that attribute.

 
C. Each day, create a new table to hold session data; delete the previous day’s table.

 
D. Add an attribute with the expiration time; name the attribute ItemExpiration.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/7225-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-107/



19. A developer is updating an application deployed on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. The new version is incompatible with the old version. To successfully deploy the update, a full cutover to the new, updated version must be performed on all instances at one time, with the ability to roll back changes in case of a deployment failure in the new version.How can this be performed with the LEAST amount of downtime?
 
A. Use the Elastic Beanstalk All at once deployment policy to update all instances simultaneously.

 
B. Perform an Elastic Beanstalk Rolling with additional batch deployment.

 
C. Deploy the new version in a new Elastic Beanstalk environment and swap environment URLs.

 
D. Perform an Elastic Beanstalk Rolling deployment.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28028-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-302/



20. A company’s ecommerce website is experiencing massive traffic spikes, which are causing performance problems in the company database. Users are reporting that accessing the website takes a long time.A Developer wants to implement a caching layer using Amazon ElastiCache. The website is required to be responsive no matter which product a user views, and the updates to product information and prices must be strongly consistent.Which cache writing policy will satisfy these requirements?
 
A. Write to the cache directly and sync the backend at a later time

 
B. Write to the backend first and wait for the cache to expire

 
C. Write to the cache and the backend at the same time

 
D. Write to the backend first and invalidate the cache





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28841-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-225/



21. A company is managing a NoSQL database on-premises to host a critical component of an application, which is starting to have scaling issues. The company wants to migrate the application to Amazon DynamoDB with the following considerations:Optimize frequent queriesReduce read latenciesPlan for frequent queries on certain key attributes of the tableWhich solution would help achieve these objectives?
 
A. Create global secondary indexes on keys that are frequently queried. Add the necessary attributes into the indexes.

 
B. Create local secondary indexes on keys that are frequently queried. DynamoDB will fetch needed attributes from the table.

 
C. Create DynamoDB global tables to speed up query responses. Use a scan to fetch data from the table.

 
D. Create an AWS Auto Scaling policy for the DynamoDB table.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/29304-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-277/



22. A company has a multi-tiered web application on AWS. During a recent spike in traffic, one of the primary relational databases on Amazon RDS could not serve all the traffic. Some read queries for repeatedly accessed items failed, so users received error messages.What can be done to minimize the impact on database read queries MOST efficiently during future traffic spikes?
 
A. Use Amazon S3 to cache database query results.

 
B. Use Amazon RDS as a custom origin for Amazon CloudFront.

 
C. Use local storage and memory on Amazon EC2 instances to cache data.

 
D. Use Amazon ElastiCache in front of the primary database to cache data.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4266-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-150/



23. A company wants to migrate its web application to AWS and leverage Auto Scaling to handle pear workloads. The Solutions Architect determined that the best metric for an Auto Scaling event is the number of concurrent users. Based on this information, what should the Developer use to autoscale based on concurrent users?
 
A. An Amazon SNS topic to be triggered when a concurrent user threshold is met

 
B. An Amazon Cloudwatch Networkin metric

 
C. Amazon CloudFront to leverage AWS Edge Locations

 
D. A Custom Amazon CloudWatch metric for concurrent users.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: D
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/4289-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-26/



24. A company is running a Docker application on Amazon ECS. The application must scale based on user load in the last 15 seconds.How should a Developer instrument the code so that the requirement can be met?
 
A. Create a high-resolution custom Amazon CloudWatch metric for user activity data, then publish data every 30 seconds

 
B. Create a high-resolution custom Amazon CloudWatch metric for user activity data, then publish data every 5 seconds

 
C. Create a standard-resolution custom Amazon CloudWatch metric for user activity data, then publish data every 30 seconds

 
D. Create a standard-resolution custom Amazon CloudWatch metric for user activity data, then publish data every 5 seconds





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/9624-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-188/



25. A company stores all personally identifiable information (PII) in an Amazon DynamoDB table named PII in AccountA. An application running on Amazon EC2 instances in Account B requires access to the PII table. An administrator in Account A created an IAM role named AccessPII with privileges to access the PII table, and made Account B a trusted entity.Which combination of additional steps should developers take to access the table? (Choose two.)
 
A. Ask an administrator in Account B to allow the EC2 IAM role permission to assume the AccessPII role.

 
B. Ask an administrator in Account B to allow the EC2 IAM role permission to assume the AccessPII role with predefined service control policies.

 
C. Ask an administrator in Account A to allow the EC2 IAM role permission to assume the AccessPII role with predefined service control policies.

 
D. Include the AssumeRole API in the application code logic to obtain credentials to access the PII table.

 
E. Include the GetSessionToken API in the application code logic to obtain credentials to access the PII table.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: BD
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28014-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-313/

Company policy requires that the master key be created, rotated, and disabled easily when needed, all for security reasons.Which solution should be used to meet these requirements?
 
A. SSE with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3)

 
B. SSE with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS)

 
C. SSE with AWS Secrets Manager

 
D. SSE with customer-provided encryption keys





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28423-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-245/



27. What type of block cipher does Amazon S3 offer for server side encryption?
 
A. Triple DES

 
B. Advanced Encryption Standard

 
C. Blowfish

 
D. RC5





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: B
Commenthttps://www.briefmenow.org/amazon/what-type-of-block-cipher-does-amazon-s3-offer-for-serv/



28. Which of the following statements about SWF are true? (Choose three.)
 
A. SWF tasks are assigned once and never duplicated

 
B. SWF requires an S3 bucket for workflow storage

 
C. SWF workflow executions can last up to a year

 
D. SWF triggers SNS notifications on task assignment

 
E. SWF uses deciders and workers to complete tasks

 
F. SWF requires at least 1 EC2 instance per domain





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: ACE
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10626-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-84/



29. An advertising company has a dynamic website with heavy traffic. The company wants to migrate the website infrastructure to AWS to handle everything except website development.Which solution BEST meets these requirements?
 
A. Use AWS VM Import to migrate a web server image to AWS. Launch the image on a compute-optimized Amazon EC2 instance.

 
B. Launch multiple Amazon Lightsail instances behind a load balancer. Set up the website on those instances.

 
C. Deploy the website code in an AWS Elastic Beanstalk environment. Use Auto Scaling to scale the numbers of instances.

 
D. Use Amazon S3 to host the website. Use Amazon CloudFront to deliver the content at scale.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: C
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/28321-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-1-question-230/



30. A legacy service has an XML-based SOAP interface. The Developer wants to expose the functionality of the service to external clients with the Amazon API Gateway. Which technique will accomplish this?
 
A. Create a RESTful API with the API Gateway; transform the incoming JSON into a valid XML message for the SOAP interface using mapping templates.

 
B. Create a RESTful API with the API Gateway; pass the incoming JSON to the SOAP interface through an Application Load Balancer.

 
C. Create a RESTful API with the API Gateway; pass the incoming XML to the SOAP interface through an Application Load Balancer.

 
D. Create a RESTful API with the API Gateway; transform the incoming XML into a valid message for the SOAP interface using mapping templates.





Click to show answer
Correct Answer: A
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/2895-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-2018-topic-1-question/



31. Company C has recently launched an online commerce site for bicycles on AWS. They have a “Product” DynamoDB table that stores details for each bicycle, such as, manufacturer, color, price, quantity and size to display in the online store. Due to customer demand, they want to include an image for each bicycle along with the existing details.Which approach below provides the least impact to provisioned throughput on the “Product” table?

B. Create an “Images” DynamoDB table to store the Image with a foreign key constraint to the “Product” table

Correct Answer: D
Commenthttps://www.examtopics.com/discussions/amazon/view/10618-exam-aws-certified-developer-associate-topic-2-question-75/



32. A Developer needs to use AWS X-Ray to monitor an application that is deployed on EC2 instances.What steps have to be executed to perform the monitoring?
 
A. Deploy the X-Ray SDK with the application and use X-Ray annotation.

 
B. Install the X-Ray daemon and instrument the application code.

33. A Development team is working on a case management solution that allows medical claims to be processed and reviewed. Users log in to provide information related to their medical and financial situations.As part of the application, sensitive documents such as medical records, medical imaging, bank statements, and receipts are uploaded to Amazon S3. 34. A company is running an application built on AWS Lambda functions. One Lambda function has performance issues when it has to download a 50MB file from the Internet in every execution. This function is called multiple times a second.What solution would give the BEST performance increase?
 
A. Cache the file in the /tmp directory

35. Given the source code for an AWS Lambda function in the local store.py containing a handler function called get_store and the following AWS CloudFormation template:What should be done to prepare the template so that it can be deployed using the AWS CLI command aws cloudformation deploy?

36. A Developer has discovered that an application responsible for processing messages in an Amazon SQS queue is routinely falling behind. 39. A Developer is working on an AWS Lambda function that accesses Amazon DynamoDB. The Lambda function must retrieve an item and update some of its attributes, or create the item if it does not exist. The Lambda function has access to the primary key.Which IAM permissions should the Developer request for the Lambda function to achieve this functionality?
 
A. dynamodb:DeleteItem dynamodb:GetItem dynamodb:PutItem

 
B. dynamodb:UpdateItem dynamodb:GetItem dynamodb:DescribeTable

 
C. dynamodb:GetRecords dynamodb:PutItem dynamodb:UpdateTable

title: Từ vựng trong đề N1 qua các năm (12/2014)
content:
Mondai 1概略 がいりゃく lược bỏ
臨む のぞむ hướng tới,tiến tới 
督促 とくそく đốc thúc,nhắc nhở 
漂う ただよう bay lơ lửng

厳正 げんせい nghiêm túc
拒む こばむ từ chối, cự tuyệt

判別 はんべつ phân biệt
採取 さいしゅ hái lượm
選出 せんしゅつ bầu cử
心細い cô đơn
密かな ひそかな âm thầm,bí mật
微か かすか Thấp thoáng nhỏ bé 
食い止める くいとめる ngăn cản 
投げ出す. なげだす ném đi,vứt đi,từ bỏ 
吸い上げる すいあげる hút lên 打ち切る huỷ bỏ
キャリア nghề nghiệp
ノルマ chỉ tiêu công việc
チーフ. Đầu bếp,chỉ huy
コスト Giá cả
異色の組み合わせ kết hợp cái lạ,hiếm, 
大差 たいさ khác biệt lớn 
変形 へんけい biến hình
遠隔 えんかく từ xa
駆使 くし sử dụng
引用 trích dẫn
充当 じゅうとう chiếm hữu
摂取 せっしゅ truyền ,tiêm 
信頼が揺らぐ niềm tin bị lung lay 
浮かれ うかめ ăn mừng
乱れる みだれる lịch trình hỗn loạn

Mondai 3気掛かり = 心配 lo lắng 
案の定 = やはり quả nhiên là 
不用意 = 不注意 k chú ý 
厄介 = 面倒な phiền phức 
回想い = 思い返して Nghĩlại 
手分け = 分担 chia ra

Mondai 4抱え込む かかえこむ ôm đồm,giữ nén trong lòng: 一人で抱え込む 
裏腹 うらはら lời nói và hành vi k thống nhất
耐えがたい khó mà chịu đựng
携わる tham gia vào việc
人ー倍ひといちばい gấpđôingthường人一倍努力してきた
復旧 ふっきゅう : Cái gì đó bị hư hỏng, làm cho nó trở về trạng thái ban đầu 
    - Thường sử dụng với đồ vật hàng ngày như điện, nước, ga
    - Chỉ mang nghĩa phục hồi về mặt vật chất
復興 Cái gì đó bị suy tàn, làm cho nó phục hồi lại- Mang nghĩa phục hồi về

title: Từ vựng trong đề N1 qua các năm (7/2014)
content:

躍進 やくしん sự bứt phá

絶大な人気を誇る sự yêu mến kinh khủng khiếp, cực kì yêu mến hâm mộ 強大 きょうだい hùng mạnh

なぞる vẽ
伝う liên tục, không ngừng

ウエイトに置く・占める chú trọng, coi trọng
メイン chính, chủ yếu
予断を許さない không thế đoán trước được

予断を持たず không cần đoán trước, cứ để mọi thứ tự nhiên 
てきぱき thạo việc, nhanh nhẹn
めきめき leng keng
サラサラ róc rác

打ち込む nhập thông tin/ say sưa, tập trung

ストレートに言う=率直に言う=ずばずばに言う nói thắng thắn

格段に=大幅に đáng chú ý, đáng kể, nhiều 至って=非常に cực kì

問題4・一律 いちりつ ngang bằng, như nhau (一律に削減する)
・剝がす bóc (nhãn hiệu, tem)
・心構え chuẩn bị tâm lý, sẵn sàng
・損なう làm tổn hại(信頼関係を損なう làm tổn hại mối quan hệ tin tưởng lẫn nhau)

・工面 xoay sở(資金を工面 xoay sở tiền vốn)

title: Từ vựng trong đề N1 qua các năm (12/2013)
content:

取り分け đặc biệt là, nhất là
いよいよ cuối cùng, càng ngày càng tăng (いよいよの時) 
正しく まさしく chắc chắn, không còn nghi ngờ gì 念頭に置くđể tâm

念頭にない không để tâm đến
ぐらぐら lung lay, choáng váng
そわそわして落ち着かない đứng ngồi không yên
ぶらぶら loanh quanh, lang thang
めそめそ suy sụp, khóc thút thít
担う になう gánh vác
素振り そぶり dấu hiệu, dáng vẻ

腕前を披露する biểu diễn trình độ
躊躇う ためらう chần chừ, lưỡng lự

Mondai ❸ことごとく=全て=残らずtất cả
雑踏 ざっとう=人ごみ đám đông người
メカニズム=仕組み hệ thống, cơ chế
裏付け=証拠 chứng cứ
すべ=方法 cách

title: Plan for studying for the TOEIC and achieving a score of 800 within 5 months using SMART goals
content:
SMARTS - Specific: To achieve a score of 800 on the TOEIC exam in 5 months.
M - Measurable: The goal is measurable as the score of 800 can be verified on the TOEIC score report.
A - Achievable: A score of 800 on the TOEIC is achievable with proper study and preparation.
R - Relevant: Improving your score on the TOEIC is relevant if you need the score for academic or professional purposes.
T - Time-bound: The goal is time-bound, with a deadline of 5 months.
Step by StepStep 1: Assess your current level: Take a practice TOEIC test to determine your current score and identify areas for improvement.
Step 2: Create a study schedule: Set aside dedicated time for TOEIC study each week, and stick to the schedule. Aim to study for at least 2 hours a day, 5 days a week.
Step 3: Study materials: Use a combination of study materials, including textbooks, practice tests, and online resources, to enhance your learning. Focus on areas where you need improvement, such as grammar and vocabulary.
Step 4: Practice, practice, practice: Regular practice is key to success on the TOEIC. Take as many practice tests as you can, and review your results to identify areas for improvement.
Step 5: Review and refinement: Regularly review what you have learned and refine your study strategies as needed. Seek feedback from a tutor or study group to identify areas for improvement.
Step 6: Take the TOEIC: After 5 months of dedicated study and preparation, take the TOEIC exam with confidence, knowing you have done everything possible to achieve a score of 800.

title: Tạo mục tiêu và hành động "Pass chứng chỉ LPIC-1 với OKRs"
content:
Mục đích
Thực hiện đạt chứng chỉ LPI LPIC-1
Nâng cao khả năng của mình trong lĩnh vực công nghệ thông tin
Tăng cơ hội nghề nghiệp trong tương lai

OKRsKế hoạch của tôi để đạt được chứng chỉ LPIC-1 bằng cách sử dụng OKRs (Objectives and Key Results) sẽ như sau:
Mục tiêu chung:Đạt được chứng chỉ LPIC-1 trong thời gian 12 tháng.
Các mục tiêu cụ thể:
Học các kiến thức cơ bản về Linux: Thực hiện học tập và làm bài tập thực hành về các chủ đề như quản lý hệ thống, quản lý tài nguyên, quản lý mạng, cấu hình và quản lý dịch vụ trong Linux trong thời gian 6 tháng.

Chuẩn bị cho kỳ thi LPIC-1: Thực hiện luyện tập và ôn tập các kiến thức đã học, cũng như làm các bài tập và bài thi mô phỏng trong thời gian 6 tháng.


Kết quả cụ thể:
Tỷ lệ hoàn thành tốt các chủ đề trong quá trình học: 80% trong 6 tháng.
Điểm trung bình trong các bài tập và bài thi mô phỏng: 85% trong 6 tháng.
Tỷ lệ thành công trong kỳ thi LPIC-1: 90% trong thời gian 12 tháng.

Sử dụng OKRs sẽ giúp tôi có một kế hoạch chi tiết và rõ ràng để đạt được mục tiêu của mình
Hành động
Tìm kiếm và tải tài liệu về LPI LPIC-1
Đăng ký và tham gia các khóa học trực tuyến
Tạo kế hoạch luyện tập và thực hành mỗi tuần
Đăng ký tham gia kỳ thi LPI LPIC-1
Theo dõi và đánh giá tiến độ của mình theo OKRs.

知恵を拝借したいんですが tôi muốn hỏi ý kiến bạn
撤回する てっかい rút lại lời nói
＝取り消す
未だに thậm chí đến giờ
頑な
不慮の死を遂げる ふりょ chết đột tử
志を遂げる hoàn thành nguyện vọng
思いを遂げる
変化を遂げる thay đổi
項垂れる うなだれる cúi đầu thất vọng
重複 じゅうふく ちょうふく lặp lại, xuất hiện trên 2 lần
滑走路 かっそうろ đường băng sân bay
るんじゃなかった。 Ước gì đã ko làm, đã ko nên làm

Mondai 4★没頭  cắm đầu, đắm chìm 研究に没頭する

Dokkai活版 かっぱん  nghề in ấn

秘訣 ひけつ bí quyết 
手応え てごたえ khả thi, phù hợp
